trail.val: FQ3 guide ~$3.9bn / EPS ~$3.30 vs Street ~$3.62bn / $3.01 (~8% rev beat, ~9th consecutive above-seasonal q); GM guided -50bps as channel repricing rolls off

forward.note: Above-seasonal streak + the -50bps GM step-down are the watch-items.

trail.val: Capacity supports the $20bn revenue target by 2030

forward.note: Long-range model anchored on industrial recovery + datacenter layer.

trail.val: UBS above Street: CY27 rev $15.2bn / EPS $13.11 (Street $14.33bn / $11.62, +12.9%); FY27 non-GAAP EPS $12.61 vs $11.26
CY27 EPS for ADI/TXN/MCHP already revised up ~23% over past two earnings seasons; positive pricing actions may 'fire' in 2H26

forward.note: Out-year estimates being revised up across the cycle recovery.

trail.val: Empower Semiconductor $1.5bn all-cash; close ~2H CY26; minimal FY26, 'significant revenue' 2027
Empower = key IVR pure-play (2028+ co-packaged power); ADI guiding initial IVR design wins in 2H26

forward.note: Datacenter-power content into AI accelerators (TPU/GPU); TXN-long/ADI-short pair-trade swing.

trail.val: UBS cautious: analog AIDC attach only ~0.4% of 1GW DC spend; ADI DC/AI exposure ~7% of revenue — narrative real but small
BofA pegs AI-DC analog TAM ~$8bn (2025) -> ~$27bn by 2030 (~28% CAGR), ADI a beneficiary

forward.note: Sources diverge sharply on size of the datacenter-power opportunity.

trail.val: Auto 'well below seasonal' (China pull-in unwind); industrial recovering
Auto path to double-digit y/y FY26 (BMS/ADAS/GMSL); BMS back to y/y growth first time in 2 years; industrial +56% y/y

forward.note: Broadening cyclical recovery is the base-business swing factor (vs the smaller DC layer).
